_FigureManagerGTKaC
    Attributes
    ----------
    canvas : `FigureCanvas`
        The FigureCanvas instance
    num : int or str
        The Figure number
    toolbar : Gtk.Toolbar or Gtk.Box
        The toolbar
    vbox : Gtk.VBox
        The Gtk.VBox containing the canvas and toolbar
    window : Gtk.Window
        The Gtk.Window
